name: ThroughTek Co., Ltd.
summary: ThroughTek Co., Ltd. provides solutions for Internet of Things (IoT) cloud services platforms. The company operates Kalay Platform, which provides customized app services to help customers deploy smart products and accelerate its time-to-market, as well as integrates video surveillance equipment, smart consumer products, and various sensors to allow brand name manufacturers, telecoms providers, system integration providers, hardware manufacturers, and other service providers to offer smart solutions. Its Kalay platform offers cloud services, including point-to-point and IoT connection, account and device management, video surveillance and cloud storage, push notifications, over the air, and smart assistant services. The company serves smart home, agriculture, and connected car industries. ThroughTek Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.
